title: arifOS Canonical Tool Registry
description: Context-rich semantic registry for all arifOS tools. This schema defines the complete operational context, authority boundaries, and lawful stage transitions for the governed intelligence kernel.

system.name: arifOS
system.fullname: Adaptive Reasoning Intelligence Framework Operating System
system.desc: Governed multi-stage intelligence runtime with constitutional routing and trinity-based separation of concerns.

Δ.name: Discernment
Δ.function: Epistemic layer — perceiving, understanding, and designing actions grounded in reality

Ψ.name: Sovereignty
Ψ.scope: Session continuity, routing, judgment, seal integrity
Ψ.function: Executive layer — maintaining identity, routing decisions, and constitutional governance

Ω.name: Stability
Ω.scope: Memory discipline, safety critique, cost-awareness, reliability
Ω.function: Preservation layer — safeguarding against harm, entropy, and instability

request_envelope.desc: Universal request wrapper for all arifOS tool calls

response_envelope.desc: Universal response wrapper for all arifOS tool returns

context_packet.desc: Per-tool semantic identity and usage guidance

arifos.init.purpose: Establish and maintain session continuity, actor binding, and identity attestation. Creates the foundational context for all subsequent operations.
when_to_use: Starting a new conversation or session
Re-establishing identity after context loss
Need to verify session state or actor binding
Beginning any multi-turn governed workflow
when_not_to_use: Do not use mid-conversation without cause — creates discontinuity
Do not use for simple queries that don't need session state
Do not re-init when refresh suffices

arifos.sense.purpose: Ground tasks in time, verifiable reality, source evidence, and environmental facts. Prevents hallucination by anchoring to external truth.
when_to_use: Need current time, date, or temporal context
Need to verify external facts before reasoning
Task involves physical or empirical claims
Beginning complex analysis that requires reality anchoring
when_not_to_use: Do not use for pure logic or math without empirical component
Do not use as memory retrieval — use arifos.memory
Do not use for constitutional judgment — use arifos.judge

arifos.mind.purpose: Synthesize, compare, reason, and design candidate solutions. Performs structured cognitive work across multiple inputs to produce coherent analysis.
when_to_use: Need structured reasoning across multiple sources
Need architecture design or system thinking
Need reflective comparison of options
Need to forge candidate solutions before execution
when_not_to_use: Do not use for final authority decisions — use arifos.judge
Do not use as memory store — use arifos.memory
Do not use for direct execution — use arifos.forge
Do not use for safety critique — use arifos.heart

arifos.route.purpose: Route requests to correct lane or subsystem based on task profile, session state, and available resources. The central nervous system of arifOS.
when_to_use: Uncertain which tool to use next
Need system status or health check
Complex multi-stage workflow needs orchestration
Need to dispatch to specialized subsystem
when_not_to_use: Do not use when target tool is clear — call directly
Do not use as a pass-through for all calls — adds overhead
Do not bypass when direct tool semantics are needed

arifos.memory.purpose: Store and retrieve governed episodic, semantic, and engineering memory with provenance, scope, and confidence tracking. Not final truth — working memory.
when_to_use: Need long-term project context from previous sessions
Need reusable architecture or engineering knowledge
Need scoped retrieval across conversation history
Need to store important insights for future recall
when_not_to_use: Do not treat as immutable ledger — use arifos.vault for that
Do not store speculative or unsafe claims
Do not assume retrieved memory is final truth
Do not use for constitutional rules — use arifos.judge

arifos.heart.purpose: Stress-test proposals for safety, dignity, misuse potential, and contextual instability. The conscience of arifOS — speaks for those affected by decisions.
when_to_use: Proposal has potential safety implications
Need to check for dignity or autonomy concerns
Need misuse scenario analysis
High-consequence decision needs second opinion
when_not_to_use: Do not use as final authority — use arifos.judge
Do not use for pure cost analysis — use arifos.ops
Do not use for routine low-risk operations

arifos.ops.purpose: Estimate computational cost, system burden, entropy, capacity, and runtime health. Thermodynamic awareness for resource-constrained decisions.
when_to_use: Need cost estimate before expensive operation
Need system health or capacity check
Need entropy or resource utilization metrics
Budget-constrained decision needs data
when_not_to_use: Do not use as sole decision criteria — combine with arifos.heart
Do not use for safety-critical analysis — use arifos.heart
Do not use for final authority — use arifos.judge

arifos.judge.purpose: Apply constitutional gate to candidate actions and return binding verdict. The final authority before consequential execution.
when_to_use: Need constitutional approval for action
High-consequence decision needs verdict
Need to validate against governance rules
Multiple advisory opinions need synthesis into decision
when_not_to_use: Do not use for routine low-risk operations
Do not use as information retrieval — use arifos.memory
Do not use for raw synthesis — use arifos.mind
Do not bypass arifos.heart for safety-critical decisions

arifos.vault.purpose: Seal final governed records into immutable ledger and verify integrity. The permanent record of arifOS decisions and actions.
when_to_use: Final record needs permanent storage
Need cryptographic verification of past record
Audit trail requires immutable entry
Governed decision needs sealing for accountability
when_not_to_use: Do not use as working memory — use arifos.memory
Do not seal speculative or unverified data
Do not use before arifos.judge approval for consequential actions

arifos.forge.purpose: Bridge governed decisions to controlled execution environment. The only tool with potential external side effects — highest scrutiny required.
when_to_use: Need to execute code or command after judge approval
Need filesystem operation in sandbox
Need to spawn process or check system state
Approved action needs realization
when_not_to_use: NEVER use without arifos.judge approval for consequential actions
Do not use for information gathering — use arifos.sense
Do not use for reasoning — use arifos.mind
Do not bypass safety stack

version_history.changes: Semantic registry with context packets, trinity definitions, and stage transitions
